title: Find My Device - Don't Allow - Enable now - Allow Once [Only This Time - Android] [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: User navigates Find My Device permission flow with HS connected, denies then enables location with "Ask Next Time" option, verifying permission popup options and settings navigation.
steps: Start the app with the headset (HS) connected.
Tap 'Don't Allow' on the permission popup.
Grant location permission by selecting 'Ask Next Time or When I Share'.
expected: Permission popups with options "Allow Once", "Allow while using app", "Don't Allow" appear at appropriate steps. Navigation to settings occurs when enabling.
